announcements.title: BGI Annual Community Summit 2026
announcements.content: We are thrilled to announce the upcoming BGI Annual summit. This event will align all departments, showcase accomplishments of different wings, and unveil the roadmap for 2026-2027. Registration is free but mandatory.

announcements.title: Membership Fee Adjustments for Q3
announcements.content: The Executive committee has decided to stabilize membership fees starting July. Members with backdated dues are requested to settle accounts using the updated payment gateways available in the Finance board.

announcements.title: New Health Safety Protocols for Campus Hub
announcements.content: Please ensure you carry your BGI ID smartcards when entering the shared hub. This will ensure safety and allow automated attendance logs for current workshops.

events.title: Executive Leadership Workshop
events.description: A 2-day session featuring guest lecturers from leading organizations on operational excellence, team building, and scalable governance models in community systems.

events.title: AI and Robotics Open Exhibition
events.description: Showcasing custom research, computer-vision models, and mechanical robotics developed by the CS and EEE departments of BGI.

events.title: Monthly General Assembly Meeting
events.description: A touchpoint for every active member to participate, discuss budget status updates, suggest structural changes, and present reports.
events.location: Zoom Virtual Link & Main Hall Office

chats.content: Welcome everyone to the official BGI Community Internal Portal!
Wow, this looks amazing. Glad to see the platform launched!
If anyone finds any difficulties or needs resource access permissions, let me know!
Let’s review the pending registrations for the upcoming workshop today.

discussions.title: How can we increase student participation in tech seminars?
discussions.content: Lately, we’ve seen high registration numbers but only 60-70% actual attendance at tech seminars. What incentives or changes in scheduling can we make to ensure high turnout?

comments.content: I think distributing quick participation certificates can definitely boost motivation, which is why we’ve incorporated a feedback and certificate generator into this platform.
Also, providing refreshments and having the sessions in late afternoons rather than morning hours will increase attendee turnout.

discussions.title: BGI Community Volunteering Drive Ideas
discussions.content: We are planning a winter warm-clothing distribution drive and an elementary school teaching initiative. Looking for volunteers and logistics team leads. Share your department ideas here!

tasks.title: Approve Pending Member Applications
tasks.description: Review the credentials, department verification documents, and assign BGI specific identification numbers for the 24th batch candidates.

tasks.title: Design Flyers for Leadership Workshop
tasks.description: Create scalable visual posters, banners for social channels, and event email headers detailing the schedules, panelists, and register guidelines.

tasks.title: Audit Financial Expense Ledger of Q1
tasks.description: Verify all physical receipts against recorded operational costs, lunch refreshments, infrastructure utilities, and prepare PDF logs.

tasks.title: Launch Core Registration Portal v1
tasks.description: Design the layout and logic for internal directories, profile dashboards, and deploy tests to guarantee optimal responsive interactions.

submissions.fileContent: This document details the software architecture, database schemas, and interface layout blueprints developed for the BGI Portal v1.0, including API contract logs.
